$comment: Self-run loop configuration (single source of truth for ignition). Extend the run by editing untilIso on ONE line - the Task Scheduler is never re-registered. loop-launcher.ps1 reads this at every logon and every day at 07:00. Mutable runtime state (lastCriticIso) lives in the gitignored loop-state.json, NOT here, so the ops lane's clean-tree contract is never broken. See docs/fable-diagnosis-2026-07-02/O16-implementation-notes.md.
$runnerFloorNote: Version-floor marker: a persistent lane runner whose PROCESS started before this instant is executing loop-runner.ps1 code from BEFORE the self-update/heartbeat fixes (#672 heartbeat 13:30, #675 hot-swap self-update 13:43, both 2026-07-03 JST). Such a live-but-ancient runner can NEVER hot-swap itself (it lacks the self-update code) and is invisible to the watchdog (which only revives DEAD lanes), so it runs stale forever. The launcher cooperatively cycles below-floor runners ONLY when idle (zero child processes = between iterations = clean tree), so no in-flight Claude turn is ever broken. Bump this ONLY when a runner-code change must be force-deployed to already-running lanes; leave empty to disable cycling.
